---
title: "Billing and AI credits"
description: "Rumizi is free to use — you only pay for AI usage. Every venue starts with $20 of AI credit and can top up any time."
sidebarTitle: "Billing"
icon: "credit-card"
---

Rumizi is **free software**. There's no monthly fee, no trial, and no
feature gates on the workspace itself. The only thing you ever pay for is
**AI usage** — and you only pay for what you actually use.

## How it works

<Columns cols={2}>
  <Card title="The software is free" icon="gift">
    Upload menus, edit, publish, translate, share QR codes, invite staff —
    all of it is free, forever, with no time limit.
  </Card>
  <Card title="You pay for AI usage" icon="sparkles">
    Things like menu extraction, the vendor and diner assistants, and AI
    image generation draw from your **AI credit** balance.
  </Card>
</Columns>

## $20 free credit on day one

Every new venue starts with **$20 of free AI credit**. No card required,
no time limit — the credit doesn't expire and you don't need a
subscription to use it.

That's enough to extract a typical menu, generate a handful of item
photos, and answer plenty of diner questions before you ever need to top
up.

## Topping up

When you want more credit, you can add any amount from **$1 to $10,000**
in a single top-up, from the very first day. There's no minimum
commitment and no recurring charge — you decide when and how much to
add.

<Steps>
  <Step title="Open Billing">
    In the workspace, go to **Billing**. Direct URL:
    `rumizi.com/your-venue/w/billing`.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Pick an amount">
    Type any amount between $1 and $10,000, or pick one of the suggested
    top-ups.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Pay on Stripe">
    You're sent to Stripe's secure checkout. Rumizi never sees your card
    number.
  </Step>
  <Step title="Credit lands instantly">
    After a successful payment, your AI credit balance is updated right
    away. You can go straight back to using the assistant, generating
    images, or extracting menus.
  </Step>
</Steps>

## How AI usage is priced

Rumizi runs AI through **OpenRouter**. We bill you the OpenRouter cost
of every request plus a flat **25% markup**, and that total comes out of
your AI credit balance.

There are no per-feature fees, no minimum charges per call, and no
"premium model" surcharges beyond what OpenRouter itself charges. If a
request costs OpenRouter $0.04, it costs you $0.05.

<Note>
You can see your remaining balance and a breakdown of recent AI charges
on the **Billing** page at any time.
</Note>

## What happens when credit runs out

If your AI credit reaches zero, the AI features pause until you top up:

- The vendor and diner **assistants** stop responding.
- **Menu extraction** and **AI image generation** are unavailable.
- The **public menu**, the cart, *Order together*, translations, and
  every other non-AI feature keep working normally — your diners see no
  interruption.

Top up any amount and everything resumes immediately.

## Coming later: premium subscription

Down the road we plan to bundle some new features into an optional
**premium subscription**. The current free-software-plus-AI-credit
model isn't going anywhere — premium will be on top of it, for venues
that want the extras.

## Refunds

If something doesn't feel right, email
[hi@rumizi.com](mailto:hi@rumizi.com) and I'll sort it out personally.

## What's not in v1

A few billing features aren't in this version yet:

- **Auto top-up** — for now, every top-up is manual. Auto top-up when
  your balance gets low is on the roadmap.
- **In-app card management** — to update or remove a card, email
  [hi@rumizi.com](mailto:hi@rumizi.com).
- **Multi-currency billing** — top-ups are USD only. Menu prices are
  independent — your menu can be priced in any currency.
